schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Pay & Play Scheme” was launched by the Department of Sports & Youth Affairs, Government of Jharkhand. The scheme aims to provide state-level players with training and practice opportunities at the Mega Sports Complex, Hotwar, Ranchi. The scheme includes 11 sports disciplines: athletics, badminton, lawn tennis, table tennis, shooting, gymnastics, basketball, taekwondo, volleyball, wrestling, and swimming.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Training in 11 diverse sports disciplines: athletics, badminton, lawn tennis, table tennis, shooting, gymnastics, basketball, taekwondo, volleyball, wrestling, and swimming under professional supervision. - Free registration and membership for school students (up to Class 10th) with the principal’s recommendation.- Free registration and membership for international/national participants and medalists. - Athletics players enjoy 15 days of free access (non-repetitive).
schemeContent.briefDescription: The “Pay & Play Scheme” aims to provide state-level players with training and practice opportunities at the Mega Sports Complex, Hotwar, Ranchi.

children.text: The “Pay & Play Scheme” was launched by the Department of Sports & Youth Affairs, Government of Jharkhand. The scheme aims to provide state-level players with training and practice opportunities at the Mega Sports Complex, Hotwar, Ranchi. The scheme includes 11 sports disciplines: athletics, badminton, lawn tennis, table tennis, shooting, gymnastics, basketball, taekwondo, volleyball, wrestling, and swimming.

Training in 11 diverse sports disciplines: athletics, badminton, lawn tennis, table tennis, shooting, gymnastics, basketball, taekwondo, volleyball, wrestling, and swimming under professional supervision.
Free registration and membership for school students (up to Class 10
th
) with the principal’s recommendation.
Free registration and membership for international/national participants and medalists.
Athletics players enjoy 15 days of free access (non-repetitive).
Step 1:
The applicant downloads the
application form
the official website.
Step 2:
Fill out the form with accurate details and attach the required documents.
Step 3:
Submit the form at the Jharkhand State Sports Promotion Society office.
Step 4:
Pay the registration fee (₹50) and the relevant membership fee, if applicable.
NOTE:
Other athletes are willing to pay registration and membership fees.
Fee Table (https://sports.jharkhand.gov.in/documents/Pay-and-Play.pdf)

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The applicant downloads the [application form](https://sports.jharkhand.gov.in/documents/Pay-and-Play.pdf) the official website. **Step 2:** Fill out the form with accurate details and attach the required documents. **Step 3:** Submit the form at the Jharkhand State Sports Promotion Society office. **Step 4:** Pay the registration fee (₹50) and the relevant membership fee, if applicable.
**NOTE:** - Other athletes are willing to pay registration and membership fees. - Fee Table (https://sports.jharkhand.gov.in/documents/Pay-and-Play.pdf)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Jharkhand.  
1. The applicant should be a sportsperson.
1. The applicant should actively participate in state-level sports.
1. The students up to class 10th with a recommendation from the school principal and National/international participants or medalists are eligible to apply.
